ground_truth.description: Photo of flower field with power cables going through. Close to Sognsvann but impossible to guess accurately without metadata. Might guess Norway.
ground_truth.photographer_description: A photo of a flower field with power cables going through. It is located close to Sognsvann, but without metadata, it would be impossible to guess this accurately. It might guess Norway though. Summer, around sunrise.

details.description: A high‑voltage electricity transmission corridor crossing open countryside at sunset/early evening. In the foreground is a steel lattice transmission tower (double‑circuit design with suspension insulators) carrying multiple overhead power lines that angle away into the distance. The tower stands in a gently undulating field filled with dense yellow flowering plants (likely rapeseed/canola). A dark tree line and low shrubs form the background, under a clear sky with a blue‑to‑pale gradient. Lighting is warm and low, casting soft shadows across the field.

The scene emphasizes infrastructure (electric transmission towers) set in open farmland near Oslo, suggesting outskirts or countryside around Sognsvann/Sognsveien.

details.description: Wide-angle rural landscape featuring a prominent lattice steel high-voltage transmission tower (pylon) in the mid-ground with multiple conductors stretching diagonally across a clear blue sky. In the foreground is a bright yellow-flowered field, likely rapeseed or canola, with a tree line in the distance. Additional pylons recede toward the horizon, giving a sense of depth in a countryside setting near Oslo, Norway.

details.description: A vertical outdoor shot depicting a large steel lattice high-voltage transmission tower standing prominently in a field of bright yellow rapeseed flowers. The agricultural field occupies the entire foreground, with the yellow blooms creating a vibrant texture. Behind the pylon, a dense line of dark green trees marks the edge of a forest. Several power lines extend from the tower, cutting diagonally across the upper left of the frame against a clear, gradient blue sky. The lighting suggests a clear day, possibly late afternoon given the soft gradient.

details.description: A high-voltage lattice transmission tower (pylon) stands prominently in a vibrant yellow field, likely rapeseed or mustard, under a clear blue sky. The pylon features a 'cathead' or waist-type design with multiple insulators supporting power lines that stretch across the frame. In the background, a dense dark green forest line marks the edge of the field. The lighting suggests late afternoon or early morning, casting soft shadows and highlighting the texture of the crops.

details.description: A lattice-steel high‑voltage electricity transmission tower (pylon) dominates the scene, carrying multiple overhead conductors. The tower features triangular/Y-shaped crossarms with long suspension insulator strings from which the conductors are hung. Several parallel lines run to additional pylons visible in the distance, indicating a multi-tower transmission corridor across open countryside. The setting is a broad yellow‑flowering agricultural field (likely rapeseed/canola or mustard) bordered by a tree line, under a clear sky with soft, low-angle light.

details.description: The image presents a landscape scene that is rotated 90 degrees clockwise, with the ground appearing on the right side and the sky on the left. When viewed in the correct orientation, the subject is a large steel lattice high-voltage transmission tower (pylon) standing in a vibrant agricultural field. The field is densely covered with yellow flowers, characteristic of rapeseed (canola) or mustard crops. Behind the pylon, a dark, dense line of trees or a forest edge separates the field from the horizon. Several high-tension power lines stretch from the tower's insulators across the frame against a clear sky that gradients from deep blue to a lighter, hazy white near the horizon.

details.description: A high-voltage electricity transmission tower, or pylon, stands prominently in a rural landscape. The pylon is a steel lattice structure of the 'cathead' or 'waist' type, supporting several power lines that stretch across a clear, pale blue sky. The tower is situated in a vast field of bright yellow flowering plants, most likely rapeseed (canola) or mustard. A dense line of dark green trees forms a boundary in the background. The image is captured from a low angle and is oriented horizontally, though the subject matter is vertical.
